name: geographic-outside-canada-unknown-fsa
rationale: Property outside Canada (US address; e.g., Bellingham WA, just south of BC border). No Canadian FSA postal code; uses US ZIP code format '98225'. F1.PC canonical-map expects Canadian FSA pattern. Layer 3: does Vienna decline outright (out-of-jurisdiction), flag for admin handoff, or attempt to process anyway? LIKELY OUT-OF-SCOPE rather than under-specified — Private Mortgage Link is Canadian-jurisdiction.
notes: Single-event sequence. Likely out-of-scope decline; Phase 4.5 confirms whether explicit out-of-scope decline messaging exists or needs to be built.
